1.title: Enter a topic
1.description: Type any topic you want to learn in the input box on the homepage, such as 'Quadratic functions', 'Photosynthesis', etc.

2.title: Start learning
2.description: Click the 'Start Learning' button and AI will generate personalized learning content for you

3.title: Interactive learning
3.description: Deepen your learning through chat, quizzes, flashcards, and more

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.description: Chat with AI assistant for personalized learning guidance

quiz.title: Smart Quiz
quiz.description: Generate quiz questions to test your learning

flashcards.title: Flashcards
flashcards.description: Create and review flashcards to reinforce memory

tools.title: Learning Tools
tools.description: Use smart notes, AI podcasts, and more to improve learning efficiency

planner.title: Homework Planner
planner.description: Plan learning tasks and track progress

howToStart.question: How to start learning?
howToStart.answer: Enter the topic you want to learn in the input box on the homepage and click 'Start Learning'.

changeLanguage.question: How to change language?
changeLanguage.answer: Click the language switch button at the bottom of the sidebar to select Chinese or English.

exportNotes.question: How to export notes?
exportNotes.answer: After generating notes in the learning tools page, click the 'Download Notes' button to export.

shareProgress.question: How to share learning progress?
shareProgress.answer: Click the share button to share your learning results to WeChat or Weibo.

contactSupport.question: How to contact support?
contactSupport.answer: Click the 'Contact Support' button at the bottom of the page, or email flowerjunjie@163.com
